description: Accept completed maintenance work and trigger scrip:assign-pay. For convergence tasks (validate, freshen): fires after 2-of-3 workers agree on the verdict; all 3 workers are paid regardless of individual verdict (incentivizes honest reporting). For algorithmic tasks (compress): fires when size reduction >= 30% AND semantic similarity >= 0.85. For algorithmic tasks (enrich): fires when metadata completeness improvement >= 20%. Each assign-accept references one assign-complete and triggers one scrip:assign-pay.

args.name: target
args.description: Message ID of the exchange:assign-complete message being accepted.

args.name: bounty_paid
args.description: Scrip bounty paid to this worker in micro-tokens. Must match the original assignment's bounty.

args.name: convergence_verdict
args.description: The majority verdict from convergence validation. Included for validate and freshen tasks. Indicates the consensus, not this individual worker's verdict.

args.name: validation_method
args.description: How the work was validated. convergence: 2-of-3 agreement. algorithmic: automated metric check.
